data.boundaryNotice: Compliance guidance only; does not replace legal review
assumptions: Automated checks cover ~40% of WCAG criteria — manual review required for full compliance

output.summary: Found 5 potential issues. Manual audit required for full WCAG 2.2 AAA compliance.

findings.fix: Add Skip to main content as first focusable element

findings.issue: Text contrast may fall below AAA threshold (7:1)
findings.fix: Raise foreground/background contrast ratio to at least 7:1 for normal text

findings.issue: Form inputs should include visible labels
findings.fix: Add <label for='field-id'> or aria-labelledby pointing to visible label element

findings.issue: Images and icons require descriptive alt text
findings.fix: Audit all elements — add meaningful alt text or alt='' for decorative usage

findings.issue: External links should indicate they open in a new tab
findings.fix: Add rel='noopener noreferrer' and a screen-reader announcement such as '(opens in new tab)'

output.next_step: Run manual keyboard-only navigation and screen reader test against each finding
